initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN gender.gender = 'Female' AND publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM superhero
JOIN gender ON superhero.gender_id = gender.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN gender.gender = 'Female' AND publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM superhero
JOIN gender ON superhero.gender_id = gender.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN gender.gender = 'Female' AND publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM superhero
JOIN gender ON superhero.gender_id = gender.id
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id;

JOIN gender ON superhero.gender_id = gender.id
